## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes (from `glyph-compiler/`)
- [ ] New behavior has a test (and a `tests/negative/` case if it adds a diagnostic)
- [ ] Examples still pass `tsc --strict` (if the emitter/typechecker changed)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-visible (guide / spec / `docs/reference/`)
- [ ] For a language change: discussed in an issue first (the grammar is the spec)
